title: Extreme weather in 2025 drove record wildfire emissions in Europe
summary: Europe, the fastest-warming continent, saw unprecedented wildfires and heatwaves in 2025, including a three-week hot spell that hit 30°C inside the Arctic circle

title: Apple Weather down? iPhone app experiencing issues right now [U: Fixed]
summary: Apple Weather is experiencing intermittent outages and issues loading for many users, per social media reports and Downdetector.com. Here’s the latest. Update: Apple says the outage is resolved, confirming it lasted from 10:45 AM to 2:30 PM. Original post below. more…
